# Boutique Diving Bali
> Indonesia's premier personal diving concierge. Fully bespoke, private diving experiences across Bali and Indonesia.

## About
Boutique Diving Bali is a personal diving concierge service founded by Dominic Frei, an SSI-certified Swiss diving professional based in Bali since 2021. Every experience is designed from scratch around the client's wishes, skill level, and comfort. No fixed packages, no group tours.

## Services
- Dive Butler Service: Personal diving companion across all of Indonesia — liveaboards, resorts, any destination.
- Open Water Diver: Private SSI certification in Bali. From age 15.
- Junior Open Water Diver: Private SSI certification for children aged 10–14.
- Scuba Explorer: First underwater adventure for kids aged 8–12. Pool-based.
- SSI Specialty Courses: Deep Diving, Nitrox, Night, Wreck, Navigation, and more.
- Scuba Skills Update: Private refresher for certified divers.
- Custom Fun Dives: Dream dives designed from scratch — mantas, wrecks, macro, night dives.

## Destinations
Based in Tulamben, Bali. Serving all of Indonesia including Komodo, Raja Ampat, Banda Sea, Nusa Penida, Amed, Padang Bai, Menjangan, Wakatobi, Alor.

## Key Facts
- SSI certified (not PADI)
- All experiences fully private
- No fixed prices — every proposal is bespoke
- Languages: English and German

## Contact
- Email: info@boutiquedivingbali.com
- Instagram: @boutiquedivingbali
- Website: https://www.boutiquedivingbali.com
